metadata.rulesText: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into his or her library, then reveals the top card of his or her library. If it's a permanent card, he or she puts it onto the battlefield.

customAttributes.description: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into his or her library, then reveals the top card of his or her library. If it's a permanent card, he or she puts it onto the battlefield.

formattedAttributes.Description: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into his or her library, then reveals the top card of his or her library. If it's a permanent card, he or she puts it onto the battlefield.

metadata.rulesText: Sacrifice Loyal Retainers: Return target legendary creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only during your turn, before attackers are declared.

customAttributes.description: Sacrifice Loyal Retainers: Return target legendary creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only during your turn, before attackers are declared.

formattedAttributes.Description: Sacrifice Loyal Retainers: Return target legendary creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only during your turn, before attackers are declared.

metadata.rulesText:
Creatures you control have haste.
Cascade, cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom of your library in a random order. Then do it again.)

metadata.rulesText: As The Mimeoplasm enters the battlefield, you may exile two creature cards from graveyards. If you do, it enters the battlefield as a copy of one of those cards with a number of additional +1/+1 counters on it equal to the power of the other card.

customAttributes.description: As The Mimeoplasm enters the battlefield, you may exile two creature cards from graveyards. If you do, it enters the battlefield as a copy of one of those cards with a number of additional +1/+1 counters on it equal to the power of the other card.

formattedAttributes.Description: As The Mimeoplasm enters the battlefield, you may exile two creature cards from graveyards. If you do, it enters the battlefield as a copy of one of those cards with a number of additional +1/+1 counters on it equal to the power of the other card.

metadata.rulesText: Whenever an opponent draws a card, you may pay 1. If you do, draw a card.
metadata.flavorText: “Ideas drift like petals on the wind. I have only to lift my face to the breeze.”

customAttributes.description: Whenever an opponent draws a card, you may pay 1. If you do, draw a card.

metadata.rulesText:
Creatures you control get +1/+1.
Whenever you tap a land for mana, add one mana to your mana pool of any type that land produced.
metadata.flavorText: Even after a false god tore the magic from Dominaria, power still radiated from the Mirari sword that slew her.

metadata.rulesText: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays 1.
metadata.flavorText: Friends teach what you want to know. Enemies teach what you need to know.

metadata.rulesText: 1, T: Exile any number of cards from your hand face down. Put that many cards from the top of your library into your hand. Then look at the exiled cards and put them on top of your library in any order.

customAttributes.description: 1, T: Exile any number of cards from your hand face down. Put that many cards from the top of your library into your hand. Then look at the exiled cards and put them on top of your library in any order.

formattedAttributes.Description: 1, T: Exile any number of cards from your hand face down. Put that many cards from the top of your library into your hand. Then look at the exiled cards and put them on top of your library in any order.

metadata.rulesText: At the beginning of your draw step, you may draw two additional cards. If you do, choose two cards in your hand drawn this turn. For each of those cards, pay 4 life or put the card on top of your library.

customAttributes.description: At the beginning of your draw step, you may draw two additional cards. If you do, choose two cards in your hand drawn this turn. For each of those cards, pay 4 life or put the card on top of your library.

formattedAttributes.Description: At the beginning of your draw step, you may draw two additional cards. If you do, choose two cards in your hand drawn this turn. For each of those cards, pay 4 life or put the card on top of your library.

metadata.rulesText:
Intimidate
Other creatures you control have intimidate.
Whenever Vela the Night-Clad or another creature you control leaves the battlefield, each opponent loses 1 life.
metadata.flavorText: Vela snuffs out every trace of Krond’s reign, leaving pure nightfall in her wake.

metadata.rulesText:
Destroy all creatures. They can't be regenerated. Draw a card for each creature destroyed this way.
Cycling 3BB (3BB, Discard this card: Draw a card.)
When you cycle Decree of Pain, all creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

metadata.rulesText:
Imprint — When Duplicant enters the battlefield, you may exile target nontoken creature.
As long as the exiled card is a creature card, Duplicant has that card's power, toughness, and creature types. It's still a Shapeshifter.

customAttributes.description:
Imprint — When Duplicant enters the battlefield, you may exile target nontoken creature.

metadata.rulesText: Whenever a creature deals combat damage to one of your opponents, its controller may draw a card.

metadata.rulesText:
Flying
Whenever Kaalia of the Vast attacks an opponent, you may put an Angel, Demon, or Dragon creature card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped and attacking that opponent.
metadata.flavorText: "I'll have my revenge if I have to call on every force from above and below."
